code: import axios from"axios";const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||""});export const fetchSummary=()=>api.get("/api/dashboard/summary").then(r=>r.data);export const fetchForex=()=>api.get("/api/forex").then(r=>r.data);export const fetchTrade=code=>api.get("/api/trade/".concat(code)).then(r=>r.data);export const fetchPopulation=()=>api.get("/api/population").then(r=>r.data);export const fetchPipelineRuns=()=>api.get("/api/pipeline/runs").then(r=>r.data);export const triggerPipeline=()=>api.post("/api/pipeline/run").then(r=>r.data);
